summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Business Management System UI/UX refinements. All requested changes successfully implemented and working correctly.

minor_issues.issue: Delete operations fail after logout due to authentication
minor_issues.impact: Minor - only affects test cleanup, not user functionality

passed_tests: Backend health check and authentication
Admin login/logout with httpOnly cookies
Dashboard API with metrics calculation
Customer, Supplier, Product, Order, Invoice, Purchase, Payment CRUD operations
Forgot Password flow with OTP generation and reset
Login page shows 'Commerical Trading' branding
Dashboard header shows 'Commerical Trading'
Sidebar shows 'Commerical Trading'
Login with admin@example.com / admin123 works
Forgot Password link visible and functional
Complete Forgot Password flow: email -> OTP -> reset -> login
All currency displayed as Rs. format (10+ instances on dashboard, 6 on invoices, 3 on payments)
No INR (₹) symbol found anywhere in the system
Products page has NO Category column in table
Add Product form has NO Category field
Price fields in Add Product form default to empty (not 0)
Number input fields have no up/down spinner arrows (hidden via CSS)
Invoice print view shows 'Commerical Trading' header
Order creation form shows Rs. currency format
Payment amount fields properly formatted
